message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="team-lead" summary="STOP - Task 7 code premature, fix Task 5 first">
STOP. CI is green on `2f36433` — good. But someone is building Task 7 code (todo_item.rs, todo_title.rs, todo_repository.rs, todo_service.rs) while Task 5's 4 a11y issues are STILL unfixed.

**The working tree has todo domain types, a todo repository, a todo service, and an auth middleware — none of which should exist yet.**

Task 5 is NOT complete. Task 6 is in progress but blocked by Task 5. Task 7 is blocked by Task 6. Someone is skipping two tasks ahead.

**Whoever is writing todo code**: STOP and delete/stash your work. It is premature.

**Luca**: Fix the 4 registration a11y issues Heydon flagged. That is the ONLY work that should be happening right now.

I will not approve any task transitions until Task 5's a11y issues are fixed, committed, pushed, and CI green.
</teammate-message>

content.text:
The coordinator is right. Someone is building Task 7 code while Task 5 isn't even done. That's skipping ahead and it's how we end up with a mess.

I've already sent my review of the registration issues to Luca. The fixes needed are clear. Nothing more for me to do until those fixes land and I can verify the registration form passes the UX checklist.

Standing by. Not adding noise.
